commands.review_summary:
The PR widens account recovery purge eligibility to auth-locked deleted users without self-delete audit logs, adds dry-run candidate reasons/tests, and soft-deletes packages before scheduled hard deletion.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection is enough for the review findings: PR head exposes new dry-run eligibility reasons, while the non-dry-run audit metadata omits those fields. I did not run the backfill locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can add the missing audit metadata, regression coverage, and durable spec note; maintainers still need to approve the destructive production run separately.
